name: Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC)
summary: Day 67 Tuesday. **IRGC LED MULTI-AXIS KINETIC RESTART MAY 4 — KINETIC PAUSE BROKEN AFTER 12+ DAYS.** IRGC launched cruise missiles + drones + small boats at US Navy + commercial vessels in Hormuz; 4 cruise missiles + drone strike at UAE Fujairah; targeting of SK-flagged HMM Namu. US helicopters sank 6 Iranian fast boats. IRGC via Tasnim claimed it 'prevented US warships from entering Strait of Hormuz with a firm and swift warning' (CENTCOM denied US destroyer struck — CLAIMED-DISPUTED). Tasnim warned 'if UAE takes unwise action, all of its interests will become Iran's target.' Apr 30 framing of 'OPERATIONAL PARALYSIS UNDER VAHIDI-IRGC' is now superseded — IRGC's May 4 kinetic operation suggests Plan B was always on the shelf, and Trump's rejection of 14-point produced the operational case. Tasnim/Fars (IRGC-linked outlets) had carried the May 1-3 14-point proposal positively; same outlets May 4 reverted to ESCALATING-DEFIANT framing (IRNA called Project Freedom 'delirium'). The state-media coordination on the kinetic restart confirms IRGC inner circle aligned (or always aligned) with kinetic-option-on-the-shelf. Pezeshkian voice not amplified May 4 — civilian-government vs IRGC posture diverging. The IRGC consolidation that produced operational paralysis Apr 28-29 produced operational kinetic restart May 4 — the consolidation was for STRIKING capability not for negotiation alone. Iran rial 1.818M IRR/USD remittance (decelerated; flat 4 sessions despite kinetic restart).
